_comment: Recommended starter MCP configuration for code4me projects. Copy to your project root as `.mcp.json`, edit per project shape, remove this _comment key (JSON doesn't support comments — keys starting with underscore are convention only). See the README 'MCP support' section for guidance on which subagent prefers which MCP.

sequential-thinking._purpose: Structured chain-of-thought reasoning. Useful for Lead Architect, Challenger Architect, Researcher, Product Coach on complex problems.

filesystem._purpose: Sandboxed file IO for agents that need read/write outside the immediate project context.
filesystem._disabled_by_default: Uncomment and configure the allowed directory if you need it; otherwise the standard Read/Edit/Write tools cover normal cases.

github._purpose: PRs, issues, code search across your GitHub repos. Useful for Producer (ticket triage), Developer (PR shape), Code Reviewer (PR context).
github._setup: Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your shell environment before invoking Claude Code. Use a fine-grained PAT scoped to the repos you want the agent to access.

playwright._purpose: Real-browser automation via accessibility tree. Useful for Verification + QA on web-touching projects: real clicks, real screenshots, accessibility-tree snapshots (much more token-efficient than image captures). Pairs with the codex-developer/codex-code-reviewer review-spec-fit mode for visual verification.
playwright._disabled_by_default: Web/UI work only. If your project is server-only, library code, native desktop, or anything without a browser surface, leave this disabled. First run downloads a Chromium binary (~150MB).

sentry._purpose: Production error context for QA and Developer when investigating reported bugs.
sentry._setup: Set SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN and SENTRY_ORG. Skip this server if your project doesn't use Sentry.
sentry._disabled_by_default: Uncomment when you've set up Sentry credentials.

postgres._purpose: Read-only schema/query access for Developer, Verification, QA on data-shape questions. The reference implementation is archived; use a vendor-official Postgres MCP server (Neon, Supabase, etc.) or a community fork — pin the version.
postgres._disabled_by_default: Configure with your project's connection string; ensure the role is read-only.

_subagent_preferences._comment: Document in your project CLAUDE.md which subagent should prefer which MCP. Suggested defaults:
Verification: playwright (UI smoke + screenshots — web projects only)
